figures.title: Critical Override Engine Flowchart
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 4 - Critical Override Engine Flowchart flowchart TD A400["400 - Synchronization
Cycle"] --> A402{"402 - Any Subsystem in
Critical State?"} A402 -->|No| A404["404 - Normal
Operation"] A402 -->|Yes| A406["406 - Identify Non-Critical
Subsystems"] A406 --> A408{"408 - Below Minimum
Restriction Level?"} A408 -->|No| A410["410 - Skip"] A408 -->|Yes| A412["412 - Translate Target
to Local Phase"] A412 --> A414["414 - Invoke Forced
Phase Transition"] A414 --> A416{"416 - Transition
Successful?"} A416 -->|Yes| A418["418 - Record
Success"] A416 -->|No| A420["420 - Record
Failure"] A418 --> A422["422 - Emit Governance
Event via Bus"] A420 --> A422 style A400 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A402 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A404 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A406 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A408 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A410 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A412 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A414 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A416 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A418 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A420 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A422 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

reference_numerals.402: Critical State Detection in Unified Phase Model
reference_numerals.410: Skip - Already at Minimum Restriction Level
reference_numerals.412: Translate Target Restriction to Subsystem-Local Phase Model
reference_numerals.422: Emit Governance Event via Event Propagation Bus

figures.title: Synchronization Cycle Sequence
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 6 - Synchronization Cycle Sequence sequenceDiagram participant M as 600 - Governance
Coordination System participant G as 602 - Subsystem
Governors participant PT as 604 - Phase Translator
Module participant TA as 606 - Trust Temporal
Alignment Module participant CO as 608 - Critical Override
Engine participant RES as 610 - Resonance
Provider Module participant BUS as 612 - Event
Propagation Bus M->>G: Read Current Phase and Trust Score G-->>M: Subsystem-Local Phase at Native Update Rate M->>PT: Translate to Canonical Unified Phase PT-->>M: Unified Phases via Bidirectional Mapping M->>TA: Time-Constant-Preserving Transformation TA-->>M: Temporally Aligned Trust Scores M->>M: Detect Phase Transitions M->>CO: Evaluate Critical State Override CO-->>G: Forced Phase Transition to Minimum Restriction M->>RES: Advance Coupled Oscillator Model RES-->>M: Synchronization Order Parameter M->>M: Compute Composite Trust and Composite Phase M->>BUS: Emit Governance Events BUS-->>G: Events to Registered Listeners
